scope: Battle Command map-inspection order-transfer roles carrying into After Action and officer events
steps: Opened the local app at the strategic map.
Clicked `幕舎で準備する`, `出撃配置へ`, and `選抜部隊で戦闘開始`, waiting about 3 seconds after each action.
Ran the battle at `3倍` until enemy groups spawned, then clicked `停止`.
Clicked a visible enemy map token and verified `敵前縁布陣予測` and `敵前縁へ布陣` were visible in the map-selection inspector.
Clicked `敵前縁へ布陣` and verified the selected brigade received anchor `X45 Y48`, fallback `X29 Y48`, and focus target `アンデッド群集`.
Clicked `撤退実行`, then `戦果報告へ`.
Verified After Action displayed the new role and carryover text.

verified.afterActionRole: 任務 検査敵前縁布陣
verified.officerEvent: 第1戦列歩兵大隊指揮官: 検査敵前縁布陣、指揮経験+5、危険度48、撤退後衛危険、後衛損耗18、負傷なし

notes: This QA used the enemy-front transfer path as the representative order-transfer carryover path.
Facility-transfer and frontline-transfer labels use the same BattleResult role mapping path and were build-verified.
Mobile/cellphone QA remains outside the current target.
